title: stelis rictus
intro: Stelis rictus, also known as the "jaguar's ear," is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of phenanthrene alkaloids. The health benefits of Stelis rictus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Stelis rictus are typically made by drying and grinding the plant's roots and stems, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
